prompts.prompt:
Ultra-realistic architectural competition presentation board, portrait A1 layout, 4K resolution, mixed media visualization

SHEET COMPOSITION:
Full architectural board layout with balanced visual hierarchy. Top-third: large detailed 2D front elevation with fine linework, grid lines, section markers, and dimensional annotations in millimeters. Center-left: side and rear elevations in precise white technical drafting. Center-right: 3D isometric views and exploded axonometric component diagrams. Bottom section: concept development diagrams, design idea sketches, structural annotations, material palette callouts with timber / exposed concrete / glass labels, human scale reference figures, and landscape integration drawings. Modern architectural typography, minimal clean labeling. Negative space used intentionally for breathing room. Blueprint overlay fading at edges.

ARCHITECTURE TREE-INSPIRED MODERN CONCEPTUAL HOUSE:
Organic branching structural columns mimicking tree trunks and limbs, cantilevered volumes projecting asymmetrically, full-height glass curtain walls with slim mullions, exposed board-formed concrete cores, warm-toned timber cladding panels, green terraces cascading at each floor level, rooftop garden with native planting, elevated platform volumes integrated between existing trees, natural cross-ventilation cutaways shown in section, passive solar and sustainable strategy diagrams annotated with arrows, floor plan levels clearly marked, structural grid expressed through glazing.

3D RENDERING QUALITY:
Photorealistic materials wet concrete catching light, timber with visible grain, reflective wet stone paving, glass reflecting stormy sky dramatic warm amber interior glow bleeding through floor-to-ceiling glazing, high contrast shadows, cinematic environmental depth, ultra-sharp drafting lines overlaid on realistic render textures, {argument name="architectural style" default="Zaha Hadid / BIG / Kengo Kuma"} competition board aesthetic.

ATMOSPHERE:
{argument name="weather atmosphere" default="Dark stormy sky, heavy overcast with volumetric fog and mist rolling through trees"}, moody cinematic lighting, soft rain-wet reflective ground surfaces, deep shadow gradients, warm glowing interiors contrasting cold exterior environment, dramatic chiaroscuro, photorealistic environmental depth.

BACKGROUND & BOARD TEXTURE:
Charcoal and deep graphite toned paper texture, subtle blueprint grid lines fading behind drawings, faint construction reference lines, elegant monochromatic palette blacks, greys, off-whites with selective warm amber and timber-tone highlights, no clutter, premium studio presentation quality.

STYLE REFERENCES:

prompts.title: 社交媒体帖子 - 标注日式早餐俯拍
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a cozy overhead breakfast flat-lay photo with handwritten Japanese diary-style annotations, as if made for a warm morning social media post. The scene should feel realistic, softly edited, and slightly nostalgic.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 landscape image, about 1024×576. Use a brown-and-white gingham tablecloth covering the full background, with soft morning light, gentle shadows, and a slightly warm film-like tone.

Main layout: Place exactly 2 main food/drink areas. On the left, a decorative red-and-white porcelain teacup filled with black coffee sits on a matching saucer. On the right, a large white square plate holds the breakfast foods. Leave darkened negative space in the upper left for the title handwriting.

Food and object count: Include exactly 7 visible breakfast items/props on the plate area: 1 stack of toasted bread slices, 1 partly peeled ripe banana, 1 small mound of granola, 1 clear glass bowl of pale yellow apple compote with 1 dark prune on top, 1 brown egg, 1 small wooden egg cup or wooden coaster behind the egg, and 1 white square plate. The toast should be the visual center of the plate, with golden toasted surfaces and thick white bread edges. The banana should be at the upper left of the plate. The egg should be at the upper right. The glass bowl should be at the lower right. The granola should sit between the toast and bowl.

Handwritten text and annotation count: Add exactly 9 handwritten annotation groups in white/black ink, with arrows, circles, small hearts, sparkles, and doodles. Preserve the Japanese text as decorative handwriting:
1. Large title at top left: 「わたしの整う朝ごはん。」
2. Subtitle under title: 「シンプルだけど、ちゃんと満たされる。」
3. Circular note near coffee: 「今日も はじまりは 深い一杯から。」
4. Small note below coffee: 「ほっと息をつく、大切な時間。」
5. Torn-paper sticky note at bottom left with pink tape: 「朝の光を浴びて、心もからだも ゆっくり目覚めていく。」
6. Note above banana with arrow: 「完熟バナナで やさしい甘みを チャージ。」
7. Bubble note beside egg: 「たんぱく質で 1日を すっきり スタート！」
8. Note near toast with arrow: 「サクッと焼けた トーストが 一番のごちそう。」
9. Lower-right notes around granola, compote, and overall feeling: 「ザクザクのグラノーラで 食感と栄養をプラス。」, 「りんごとプルーンで 自然な甘さを からだにやさしく。」, and 「ちゃんと食べると、心までふんわり軽くなる。」

Visual style: Photorealistic breakfast photography mixed with casual hand-drawn overlay graphics. Use white ink for most handwriting, black ink for food labels on the plate, dotted speech bubbles, curved arrows, tiny stars, small hearts, and playful underline marks. The typography should look hand-lettered, not digital. Make the annotations readable but naturally imperfect.

Customizable elements: The title should read {argument name="headline text" default="わたしの整う朝ごはん。"}; the drink should be {argument name="morning drink" default="black coffee in a red porcelain teacup"}; the main breakfast should feature {argument name="main breakfast food" default="thick golden toast"}; the fruit should be {argument name="fruit item" default="ripe banana and apple compote with prune"}; the overall mood should be {argument name="mood" default="gentle, cozy, mindful morning"}.

Constraints: Keep the composition clean and appetizing, do not add extra foods beyond the counted items, do not add people or hands, avoid logos or watermarks, and keep the Japanese handwriting integrated into the image like a real edited breakfast journal photo.

prompts.title: 漫画/故事板 - 哥特式闹鬼沼泽地图
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a dark fantasy worldbuilding map for a gothic horror board game or campaign setting, showing a haunted swamp realm at night with branching travel routes.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 illustrated map, antique parchment border, muted blue-green-gray palette, high-detail painterly fantasy concept art. The scene is viewed from above at a slight angle, like an illustrated adventure map.

Layout: Fill the entire canvas with a misty marshland, twisted forests, bog water, ruins, and supernatural landmarks. Add an ornate thin black frame with delicate Victorian filigree corners, skull ornaments in the upper-left and upper-right corners, and a compass rose in the lower-left corner. Use moonlit lighting, fog layers, and small glowing cyan, violet, and ghostly green accents.

Map route system: Draw exactly 34 connected circular route nodes across the map: 28 blank parchment oval nodes and 6 special illustrated medallion nodes. Connect the nodes with pale winding paths that snake through the marsh. The 6 special medallions should show, from left/center to right/bottom: a feather symbol, a skull symbol, a bat-or-crest symbol, an open book symbol, a target-like spiral symbol, and a dead tree symbol. Keep the nodes empty except for these icons; no numbers.

Named location banners: Include exactly 5 curled parchment ribbon labels with readable Portuguese fantasy names: “{argument name="western gate label" default="PORTÃO ESQUECIDO"}” near the left haunted gate, “{argument name="upper right crypt label" default="CRIPTA DOS LAMENTOS"}” near the ruined crypt at the upper right, “{argument name="eastern ruins label" default="SAUDAÇÕES DA NÉVOA"}” near the right-side ruins, “{argument name="lower right lighthouse label" default="FAROL DA ALMA PERDIDA"}” near the lower-right lighthouse, and “{argument name="lower left dock label" default="ATRACADOURO SOMBRIO"}” near the lower-left dock.

Landmark details: In the upper left, place a distant black gothic castle with many spires beneath a bright full moon and storm clouds. At far left, show an iron cemetery gate glowing faint cyan. In the upper right, show a crumbling mausoleum or crypt with a pale statue in the doorway. At right-center, show jagged ghostly turquoise crystal formations and ruined stones. At lower right, show a lonely crooked lighthouse glowing purple through fog. At lower left, show a rotting wooden dock over dark water with a cyan lantern. Near the center, include a flooded obelisk island, dead trees, swamp pools, a ruined windmill, ghostly figures, and scattered grave markers.

Visual style: Grim, atmospheric, hand-painted, intricate, old-world fantasy cartography mixed with gothic illustration. Use desaturated colors, heavy mist, moonlight, painterly brushwork, and subtle paper texture. Avoid modern UI elements, bright colors, clean vector art, or extra labels beyond the 5 banners.

prompts.title: 信息图/教育视觉 - 双格奇幻伤害数字漫画
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a dramatic two-panel Japanese fantasy manga comparison comic about how large damage numbers make combat feel more satisfying, even when the time required is the same.

Canvas: Square 1:1 image, full-color manga illustration with thick black comic borders, dynamic speed lines, explosive impact effects, and a black brushstroke title banner at the top. Overall style should be detailed dark-fantasy shonen manga with bold outlined lettering.

Layout: Use exactly 2 wide horizontal comic panels stacked vertically. Add a black brushstroke header above both panels containing the title text {argument name="title text" default="『かかる時間は同じでも……』"}. Each panel has the same party of 3 heroes on the left and 1 enemy on the right, with a vertical white narration box on the far right.

Characters: The hero party appears in both panels and contains exactly 3 visible characters: 1 young male swordsman in blue armor holding a sword, 1 young female witch in a purple robe and pointed hat, and 1 small green-haired healer or cleric holding a staff. Their faces may be partially obscured or softly blurred, but their poses and outfits remain readable. Top panel enemy: 1 enormous black armored knight/golem with a shield and heavy plate armor, standing on the right. Bottom panel enemy: 1 enormous bare-chested muscular barbarian/giant with rough skin, leather/fur waist gear, and clenched fists, standing on the right.

Top panel text and effects: Include exactly 2 white speech bubbles from the heroes: 「これも効かないの!?」 and 「どうしたらいいんだよコイツ!」. Include exactly 1 vertical narration box on the right reading 「耐性がカッチカチ、よりも」. Add exactly 4 small blue damage numbers around the armored enemy: 「10!」, 「10!」, 「12!」, and 「12!」.

Bottom panel text and effects: Include exactly 2 white speech bubbles from the heroes: 「こいつ、まだ立ち向かってくる……!」 and 「なんてタフなんだ!」. Include exactly 1 vertical narration box on the right reading 「HPモリモリの方が」. Add exactly 2 huge fiery red-orange damage numbers: 「1012!」 near the center-left and 「2001!」 near the right. At the bottom, spanning across the lower panel, place a large energetic slogan in thick yellow-orange Japanese brush lettering with black outline: {argument name="bottom slogan" default="数字がでっかくて楽しい!"}.

Visual style: High contrast, gritty fantasy lighting, dramatic explosions behind enemies, manga hatching, saturated impact colors, thick white speech bubbles with black outlines, bold 3D comic typography for numbers. Make the top panel feel frustrating and low-impact with small blue numbers; make the bottom panel feel exciting and powerful with huge warm-colored numbers.

Constraints: Use exactly 2 panels, exactly 4 total main characters per panel, exactly 4 small damage numbers in the top panel, exactly 2 large damage numbers in the bottom panel, exactly 4 total speech bubbles, exactly 2 vertical narration boxes, and 1 large bottom slogan. Keep all visible Japanese text legible and avoid adding extra text or watermarks.

prompts.title: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - 唐荔枝课件封面
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create an elegant Tang-dynasty inspired courseware/PPT cover slide about {argument name="main title" default="杨贵妃 与 荔枝"}, with a poetic Chinese historical aesthetic centered on lychees and a veiled court beauty.

Canvas: 16:9 horizontal presentation cover, warm ivory handmade-rice-paper background with subtle fibers, stains, faint scratches, and ink-wash aging. Overall palette is muted cream, dusty rose, pale peach, faded red, olive gray, and ink gray.

Layout: Place the main title large on the left-center in refined Chinese calligraphy-style serif lettering. Put the small subtitle directly underneath with a decorative gold flourish at the far left. Keep generous negative space on the left and lower middle. On the right half, show a soft translucent back-view silhouette of a Tang-dynasty noblewoman with bare shoulders, high rounded hair buns, ornate gold dangling hair jewelry, and large pink-red peony flowers in her hair; her face area is intentionally covered by a plain pale beige rectangular privacy block. Add floating lychees around her and foreground depth blur.

Text content: Include exactly these visible text areas: 1) top-left small cloud-shaped seal containing “盛唐 / 风物”; 2) main title “杨贵妃 与 荔枝”; 3) subtitle “一颗果子的盛唐记忆”; 4) lower-left English stack “Tang Dynasty / Cultural Story / Courseware”; 5) lower-left Chinese label “PPT · 课件”; 6) right-side vertical poem text “长安回望绣堆，山顶千门次第开。——杜牧《过华清宫》”; 7) small tag near the peeled lychee reading “贵妃鲜” with a red seal mark; 8) bottom-right page number “01” with a small gold ornamental underline.

Subject details: Include exactly 4 visible lychee elements: one small blurred whole lychee floating near the upper center, one sharp whole lychee on the right side, one large peeled lychee in the lower-right center with translucent white flesh exposed and red bumpy skin opened around it, and one large heavily blurred partial lychee in the lower foreground. Add a few pale green lychee leaves connected to the peeled fruit. Make the lychees painterly but realistic, with bumpy red shells and soft natural highlights.

Visual style: Minimal luxury Chinese editorial design, museum-courseware cover, soft ink wash, translucent layering, shallow depth of field, delicate gold accents, understated red stamp marks, balanced asymmetrical composition, no modern UI elements.

Constraints: Keep the page clean and airy, maintain the exact count of 4 lychee elements, keep all typography readable, use no extra text beyond the specified labels, no watermark, no photorealistic harsh lighting.

prompts.title: 信息图/教育视觉 - 夜间纽约3D存档地图
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a cinematic 3D miniature architectural map of {argument name="city name" default="New York City"}, presented as a nocturnal urban archive board with raised buildings, glowing streets, waterways, landmark callouts, and technical cartographic annotations.

Canvas: Landscape 16:9 image, viewed from an elevated oblique angle as if looking down at a physical diorama map on a dark tabletop. Use a deep navy, charcoal, warm brass, and amber-light palette. The board has a thick dark frame, thin gold border lines, grid coordinates along the top/bottom and left/right edges, and a premium museum-archive feel.

Main subject: A highly detailed raised-relief 3D map of Manhattan and surrounding boroughs at night. Manhattan is centered and built as a dense miniature city with hundreds of extruded buildings, warm window lights, streetlight networks, bridges, docks, and dark reflective water. The tallest illuminated focal tower is the {argument name="central landmark" default="Empire State Building"} near the center, with a bright warm glow around Midtown. The southern tip includes a tall One World Trade Center tower. A long dark rectangle labeled Central Park sits in upper Manhattan. Surrounding flat map areas show New Jersey to the left, Queens to the right, and Brooklyn at lower right, with street grids drawn as thin golden lines.

Top title block: In the upper-left corner, add a boxed archive label reading exactly “NEW YORK CITY” with the subtitle “NOCTURNAL URBAN ARCHIVE” and a small archive code line “NYC-NAM-2024-001.” Add tiny header text along the top edge such as “LANDSCAPE ARCHIVE MODEL / 地景档案模型,” column letters across the top, and a small study label at the upper-right reading “EAST RIVER CORRIDOR STUDY” and “EDITION 01.”

Callouts and labels: Include exactly 11 named map labels/callout boxes: 1) “NEW JERSEY / HUDSON COUNTY,” 2) “HUDSON RIVER,” 3) “ONE WORLD TRADE CENTER / 1,776 ft / 541 m,” 4) “TIMES SQUARE / THEATER DISTRICT,” 5) “EMPIRE STATE BUILDING / 1,454 ft / 443 m,” 6) “CENTRAL PARK,” 7) “CHRYSLER BUILDING / 1,046 ft / 319 m,” 8) “EAST RIVER,” 9) “BROOKLYN BRIDGE / 1,595 ft / 486 m,” 10) “QUEENS / LONG ISLAND CITY,” 11) “BROOKLYN / DOWNTOWN BROOKLYN.” Use thin leader lines connecting callout boxes to landmarks.

Bottom information panels: Add exactly 4 technical panels along the bottom edge: 1) a legend panel with 6 symbol entries labeled “PRIMARY ROAD,” “SECONDARY ROAD,” “RAIL LINE,” “WATER BODY,” “PARK / GREEN SPACE,” and “MAJOR LANDMARK / BUILDING FOOTPRINT”; 2) a north arrow panel showing true north and grid north; 3) a scale panel labeled “SCALE 1:25,000” with imperial and metric scale bars; 4) an archive notes panel with small text including “ARCHIVE NOTES,” “This model represents a nocturnal capture of New York City urban form, infrastructure, and landmark illumination,” plus boxes for “ARCHIVE CODE NYC-NAM-2024-001,” “MODEL NO. 001,” and “SHEET NO. 01 / 01.”

Visual style: Ultra-detailed photorealistic miniature model mixed with technical blueprint/map design, crisp micro typography, precise gold linework, physical paper texture, slight bevels and shadows, moody night lighting, realistic reflections on rivers, and warm amber building illumination. The city should feel like a carefully directed miniature urban world, not a flat map.

Constraints: Keep all text in English except the tiny bilingual archive header already specified. Do not add people, vehicles as focal subjects, logos, or watermarks. Maintain consistent architectural-diorama language across the entire image. Use {argument name="lighting mood" default="dark nocturnal amber city lights"} and an archival cartography aesthetic with {argument name="map base color" default="deep navy blue"} background and {argument name="linework color" default="aged brass gold"} annotations.

prompts.title: YouTube 缩略图 - 日式泳池采访缩略图
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a bright Japanese YouTube-style thumbnail for a public outdoor pool interview segment, featuring {argument name="number of women" default="three"} adult women in competitive one-piece swimsuits standing on a pool deck, with their faces anonymized by soft rectangular blur. The mood is sunny, casual, and documentary-like, as if captured during a summer pool event.

Canvas: 16:9 horizontal image, high-resolution, realistic photo style, daylight, vivid colors, sharp focus, slight wide-angle perspective. Include a thin desktop window/title-bar strip at the very top with small text resembling a computer screenshot timestamp and location.

Layout: Place the three women across the foreground, full body from head to upper thighs or knees. The left woman stands in a navy blue racing swimsuit with white side accents, short black hair, facing slightly toward the center. The center woman stands in a glossy taupe/gray racing swimsuit, tied-back brown hair, one hand raised near her chest as if being interviewed. The right woman is taller, wearing a black racing swimsuit with bright blue side panels, shoulder-length black hair, hands behind her back, facing slightly toward the center. Add rectangular blurred mosaics over all 3 faces.

Background: A busy outdoor municipal pool on a sunny day with pale concrete decking, blue swimming pools, swimmers, families, umbrellas, trees, a chain-link fence, a white arched pedestrian bridge over the pool, and multiple blue safety cones. Include exactly 4 prominent blue cones in the midground: one near the left deck, one behind the center-left area, one near the center-right, and one farther right near the pool edge.

Text content: Add a bold colorful Japanese headline at the top left in two lines: {argument name="top headline" default="フレッシュプール撮影会\n水着美女にインタビュー!!"}. Use thick rounded lettering with white fill, black outline, red/pink/yellow accents, and a playful variety-show style. Add a large bottom caption spanning nearly the full width: {argument name="bottom caption" default="『ちっぱい番付』に出ています"}. Make the bottom text white with black outline, with key pink emphasis on selected characters, matching Japanese variety TV subtitles.

Visual style: Hyper-realistic summer pool photography mixed with Japanese TV-show thumbnail graphics, bright saturated blues and greens, strong sunlight, clean skin highlights, realistic swimsuit fabric shine, energetic composition.

Constraints: All women must appear as adults, non-explicit, standing naturally, no nudity, no suggestive posing, no extra foreground people, keep the 3 blurred faces and exactly 3 main swimsuit interview subjects.

prompts.title: 抽象混乱风格角色艺术
prompts.prompt:
# 通过混乱的笔记与符号集合呈现角色面部特征的艺术作品

---

## 风格
- 纸面上布满了黑墨水书写的笔记、公式、符号和随机线条。
- 纸张各处散布着涂鸦般的混乱感。
- 使用 {argument name="accent color" default="红色墨水"}（线条、填充、记号笔般的色块）进行零星点缀。
- 具有模拟笔记本涂鸦的质感。

---

## 构图
- 随机的笔记和符号覆盖整个画面。
- 黑墨水线条和字符的密度集中在“角色面部”的位置。
- 因此，给定角色的面部轮廓和表情会从混乱中隐约浮现。
- 面部并非写实风格，而是由混乱的碎片集合而成。

---

## 色调
- 以单色（黑白）为主。
- {argument name="accent color" default="红色墨水"} 零星点缀作为强调。
- 低饱和度，强调模拟纸张和墨水的质感。

---

## 表现元素
- 混合了半可读的日语、英语和数字字符串。
- 数学符号、箭头、点、斜线、十字和墨水滴。
- 面部、眼睛和头发的轮廓从符号排列的“负空间”和“阴影”中显现出来。

---

## 禁止事项
- 直接的写实肖像。
- 数字处理后的整齐几何图案。
- 多彩或过度饱和的表现形式。
- 徽标、水印或人工 CG 美学。

---

## 完成定义 (DoD)
- 整体作品呈现为“混乱的笔记与符号集合”。
- 所提供的角色面部能从混乱的密度和排列中自然浮现。
- 颜色仅限单色 + {argument name="accent color" default="红色点缀"}。
- 保持纸张和墨水的手绘质感。
tags: 抽象混乱风格角色艺术

Under the title, add a Japanese subtitle: 「MLB型本卒業基準（野手130打数未満 / 投手50投球回未満）」 and a small explanatory line: 「OVR＝総合評価 / FV＝将来価値 / ETA＝一軍定着見込み / Risk＝リスク」.

Face should be intentionally blurred or softened like an anonymized sports mockup. Use dramatic rim light from the stadium lights. At the lower right, add the featured name in large Japanese type {argument name="featured player name" default="柴田獅子"}, with romanization below: {argument name="featured romanization and position" default="SHIBATA REO / RHP"}. prompts.title: 社交媒体帖子 - 教室窗户忧郁人像
prompts.prompt:
Ultra-realistic portrait of a beautiful {argument name="subject" default="Korean woman"} standing at her desk, in the quiet act of packing up — one book held loosely against her chest with both arms wrapped around it, head turned to look out the classroom window one final time before leaving. She is not looking at anything specific. It is the look of someone memorizing a room. Camera positioned at medium distance, capturing her from mid-thigh up, centered between the window light and the classroom.
Wearing a {argument name="shirt" default="soft sage green linen button-down shirt"} tucked loosely into {argument name="trousers" default="high-waisted dark rust-brown wide-leg trousers"}, a simple brown woven belt. Tan suede ankle boots. A large worn leather tote bag half-packed on the desk beside her, a scarf tied to the handle. Thin layered gold chains at the collarbone. Long dark brown hair down, loose natural waves, a simple center part.
The golden afternoon light has taken on the deep amber quality of late-hour sun — now warm and almost melancholy, the longest shadows of the day cutting across the rows of empty desks. The window she looks toward is a rectangle of burning amber against the quieting classroom. Her sage linen shirt catches the warm light differently from every direction — cool shadow on one side, warm amber on the other.
35mm analog film grain, Kodak Portra 400 — sage green and rust brown in deeply harmonized Portra earth tones, the melancholy of late golden hour fully expressed in color. Hyper-realistic linen texture, leather bag wear detail. Shallow depth of field. Mood: the end of something unnamed, time passing without drama, the most quietly devastating composition in the series.
